# MeuGrana — Parcelas & Finanças

> The finance app built for Brazil. Track installments (parcelas), credit cards, and project your future bills.

MeuGrana is an iOS personal finance app designed specifically for the Brazilian financial system — installment purchases (parcelas), PIX, boleto, meal vouchers (vale-refeição), INSS, IRRF, and 13th salary.

## Key Features

- **Installment Tracker (Rastreador de Parcelas):** Track all installment purchases in one place. See current installment, remaining balance, and end dates.
- **Bill Projection (Projeção de Faturas):** See your credit card bill for the next 12 months. No surprises when it's time to pay.
- **Built for Brazil:** Supports PIX, boleto, meal vouchers, INSS, IRRF, 13th salary — everything international apps don't understand.
- **Complete Control:** Monthly dashboard, spending charts by category, and detailed reports.

## Premium

MeuGrana Premium unlocks:
- Unlimited cards & installments
- 12-month bill projection
- Custom categories
- Reports & trends
- CSV export
- Extra widgets

Starting at R$ 14.90/month.

## Privacy

MeuGrana is offline-first. All financial data is stored exclusively on your device (SwiftData). No personal data is collected. Premium users can optionally sync via Apple iCloud/CloudKit — MeuGrana has no access to that data.

## Links

- Website: https://meugrana.12f.dk/
- App Store: https://apps.apple.com/br/app/meugrana-parcelas-finan%C3%A7as/id6759177555
- Privacy Policy: https://meugrana.12f.dk/privacy-policy.html

## Technical Details

- Platform: iOS
- Price: Free (with Premium subscription)
- Currency: BRL (Brazilian Real)
- Languages: Portuguese (Brazil), English
- Available in: Brazil
- Contact: support@12f.dk
